items.content:
About This Role

We are seeking an Accessibility Specialist on a 12-month contract to audit our platform, establish accessibility standards, and guide our teams toward WCAG 2.2 AA compliance. You will work across design, engineering, and QA to embed accessibility into every stage of our product development process.

Accessibility is not just a compliance requirement for us; it is a core value. We want every user to have an excellent experience with our product, regardless of ability. This role will be instrumental in making that vision a reality.

Responsibilities

  • Conduct comprehensive accessibility audits of our web platform and document findings
  • Develop and maintain accessibility guidelines and best practices documentation
  • Train designers and engineers on accessible design patterns and ARIA implementation
  • Review designs, code, and pull requests for accessibility compliance
  • Build automated accessibility testing into our CI/CD pipeline
  • Serve as a subject matter expert for WCAG 2.2 AA, Section 508, and ADA compliance

Requirements

  • 5+ years of experience in digital accessibility
  • Deep knowledge of WCAG 2.1/2.2, ARIA, and assistive technology behavior
  • Experience conducting accessibility audits using both automated tools and manual testing
  • Proficiency with screen readers (NVDA, JAWS, VoiceOver) and accessibility testing tools (axe, Lighthouse)
  • Understanding of HTML, CSS, and JavaScript as they relate to accessibility

Nice to Have

  • IAAP (CPWA, WAS, or CPACC) certification
  • Experience with CMS or content authoring tool accessibility
  • Legal knowledge of ADA, EAA, and EN 301 549 compliance requirements
